mapper.select: SELECT ECCT.GATE_CD , ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECCT.VENDOR_CD FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECMT ECMT ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECMT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECMT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 GROUP BY ECCT.GATE_CD , ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECCT.VENDOR_CD

SELECT A.GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,A.BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,A.CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,A.CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,A.REG_DATE --등록일자 - [Registration Date] ,A.REG_USER_ID --등록자ID - (Registerer ID) ,A.MOD_DATE --수정일자 - (Update Date) ,A.MOD_USER_ID --수정자ID - (Updater ID) ,A.DEL_FLAG --삭제여부 - (Check whether it is deleted or not) ,A.PROGRESS_CD --진행상태코드 - (Progress Status Code) ,TO_CHAR(A.CONT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') CONT_DATE -- 계약일자 - (Contract Date) ,TO_CHAR(A.CONT_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') CONT_START_DATE -- 계약시작일자 - (Contract Start Date) ,TO_CHAR(A.CONT_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') CONT_END_DATE -- 계약종료일자 - (Contract Termination Date) ,A.CONT_DESC --계약명 - (Contract Title) ,A.CONT_REQ_CD --계약구분 [M134] : 신규, 수정, 연장 ,A.CUR --통화 [M023] ,A.CONT_AMT --계약금액 - (Contract Amount) ,A.VAT_TYPE --부가세구분[M100] - (VAT Code) ,A.SUPPLY_AMT --공급가액 - (Supply Value) ,A.VAT_AMT --부가세액 - (VAT Amount) ,A.DEPT_CD --계약부서/사무소 ,A.CONT_USER_ID --계약담당자ID - (Contract User ID ) ,A.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,substrb(A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM,0,20) VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM --업체담당자명 - [Vendor PIC User Name] ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL --업체담당자 이메일주소 ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM --협력사담당자 휴대전화번호 ,A.DELAY_RMK --지체상금 문구 ,A.DELAY_NUME_RATE --지체상금율(분자) ,A.DELAY_DENO_RATE --지체상금율(분모) ,A.STAMP_DUTY_FLAG --인지세여부 ,A.STAMP_DUTY_AMT --인지세 ,A.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM --인지세 첨부파일번호 ,A.CONT_RMK --비고 ,A.ATT_FILE_NUM --첨부파일번호 ,A.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM --업체첨부파일번호 ,A.BUNDLE_NUM --일괄계약번호 ,A.SEND_DATE --전송일시 ,A.CONT_CLOSE_DATE --강제종결일시 ,A.CONT_CLOSE_RMK --강제종결사유 ,A.CERT_TYPE --인증서종류 [M405] ,A.AMT_TYPE --금액구분[M303] ,A.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG --수기계약여부 ,A.VENDOR_EDIT_FLAG --협력사 서식수정 가능여부 ,A.ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE --최초계약시작일자 ,A.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG --자동갱신여부 ,A.AUTO_RENEW_DATE --최종자동갱신일시 ,A.AUTO_RENEW_CNT --자동갱신차수 ,A.APPROVAL_FLAG --결재여부 ,A.APP_DOC_NUM --결재문서번호 ,A.APP_DOC_CNT --결재문서차수 ,A.SIGN_STATUS --결재상태 - [M020] ,A.SIGN_DATE --결재일자 ,B.IRS_NO --업체 사업자번호 ,B.BUSINESS_SIZE --업체 기업규모 - [MP039] ,B.VENDOR_NM --업체명 ,CASE WHEN D.BID_COUNT > 1 THEN NULL ELSE D.FINAL_ESTM_PRC END FINAL_ESTM_PRC --최종예정가격
,C.RECEIPT_DATE RECEIPT_DATE --계약의뢰확정(구매접수)일 ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD=A.GATE_CD AND USER_ID=A.REG_USER_ID) CONT_USER_NM --계약담당자명 ,D.VOTE_CNT --투찰횟수 BDPG ,(SELECT SIGN_USER_ID FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND DOC_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'A' ) ) ENTER_MAN_ID --입회자ID ECCT 결재 마지막합의 ,(SELECT getUserName(GATE_CD,SIGN_USER_ID,'KO') FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND DOC_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'A' ) ) ENTER_MAN_NM --입회자 ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND DOC_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'A' ) ) ENTER_MAN_DEPT_ID --입회자부서ID ,(SELECT DEPT_NM FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND DOC_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'A' ) ) ENTER_MAN_DEPT_NM --입회자부서
,CASE WHEN A.CONT_AMT+NVL(A.VAT_AMT,0) <= 100000000 THEN 'CM00000434' WHEN A.CONT_AMT+NVL(A.VAT_AMT,0) > 100000000 AND A.CONT_AMT+NVL(A.VAT_AMT,0) <= 5000000000 THEN 'CM00000435' WHEN A.CONT_AMT+NVL(A.VAT_AMT,0) > 5000000000 THEN 'CM00001105' END ARB_APP_NM
,D.BID_DATE -- BDPG END_DATE ,C."5_CONT_AMT" "5_CONT_AMT" --중앙회계약금액(원) ,C."1_CONT_AMT" "1_CONT_AMT" --은행계약금액(원) ,C."3_CONT_AMT" "3_CONT_AMT" --기타계약금액(원) ,C."2_CONT_AMT" "2_CONT_AMT" --지역농축협계약금액(원) ,C."A_CONT_AMT" "A_CONT_AMT" --금융지주계약금액(원) ,C."B_CONT_AMT" "B_CONT_AMT" --경제지주계약금액(원) ,C."D_CONT_AMT" "D_CONT_AMT" --손해보험계약금액(원) ,C."C_CONT_AMT" "C_CONT_AMT" --생명보험계약금액(원)
,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."5_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."5_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."5_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "5_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."1_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."1_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."1_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "1_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."3_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."3_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."3_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "3_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."2_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."2_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."2_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "2_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."A_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."A_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."A_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "A_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."B_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."B_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."B_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "B_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."D_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."D_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."D_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "D_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN C."C_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(C."C_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN A.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(C."C_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "C_VAT_AMT" FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCVNGL B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = B.VENDOR_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A1.GATE_CD ,A1.BUYER_CD ,A1.CONT_NUM ,A1.CONT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(A1."5_CONT_AMT"),0) "5_CONT_AMT" --중앙회계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."1_CONT_AMT"),0) "1_CONT_AMT" --은행계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."3_CONT_AMT"),0) "3_CONT_AMT" --기타계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."2_CONT_AMT"),0) "2_CONT_AMT" --지역농축협계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."A_CONT_AMT"),0) "A_CONT_AMT" --금융지주계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."B_CONT_AMT"),0) "B_CONT_AMT" --경제지주계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."D_CONT_AMT"),0) "D_CONT_AMT" --손해보험계약금액(원) ,NVL(SUM(A1."C_CONT_AMT"),0) "C_CONT_AMT" --생명보험계약금액(원) ,MAX(TO_CHAR(B1.RECEIPT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')) RECEIPT_DATE FROM STOCECMT A1 JOIN STOCPRDT B1 ON A1.GATE_CD = B1.GATE_CD AND A1.PB_BUYER_CD = B1.BUYER_CD AND A1.PR_NUM = B1.PR_NUM AND A1.PR_SQ = B1.PR_SQ AND B1.DEL_FLAG = '0' JOIN STOCPRHD C1 ON B1.GATE_CD = C1.GATE_CD AND B1.BUYER_CD = C1.BUYER_CD AND B1.PR_NUM = C1.PR_NUM AND C1.IF_TYPE = #{IF_TYPE} JOIN STOCECCT D1 ON A1.GATE_CD = D1.GATE_CD AND A1.BUYER_CD = D1.BUYER_CD AND A1.CONT_NUM = D1.CONT_NUM AND A1.CONT_CNT = D1.CONT_CNT WHERE A1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A1.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A1.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} GROUP BY A1.GATE_CD,A1.BUYER_CD,A1.CONT_NUM,A1.CONT_CNT ) C ON A.GATE_CD = C.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = C.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = C.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = C.CONT_CNT LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT (SELECT (MAX(VOTE_CNT),0) FROM STOCBDPG WHERE GATE_CD=M.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD=M.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM=M.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT=M.BID_CNT ) VOTE_CNT --투찰횟수 BDPG
,( SELECT getUserName(GATE_CD,SIGN_USER_ID,'KO') FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = M.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = M.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = M.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND DOC_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = M.GATE_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = M.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = M.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SIGN_REQ_TYPE IN ('E', 'ES', 'EP') ) ) ARB_APP_NM --ECCT 마지막 결재자
,NVL(( SELECT BID_END_DATE||BID_END_TIME FROM STOCBDPG WHERE GATE_CD=M.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD=M.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM=M.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT=M.BID_CNT AND VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG WHERE GATE_CD=M.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD=M.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM=M.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT=M.BID_CNT ) ) , BID_DATE) BID_DATE -- BDPG END_DATE
,(SELECT FINAL_ESTM_PRC FROM STOCBDES WHERE GATE_CD=M.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD=M.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM=M.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT=M.BID_CNT) FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT -- 입찰 T.GATE_CD FROM STOCBDHD T WHERE (T.GATE_CD,T.BUYER_CD,T.BID_NUM,T.BID_CNT) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT K.GATE_CD ,K.BUYER_CD ,K.BID_NUM ,K.BID_CNT FROM STOCBDDT K WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) ) UNION ALL SELECT -- 견적 T.GATE_CD FROM STOCRQHD T WHERE (T.GATE_CD,T.BUYER_CD,T.RFX_NUM,T.RFX_CNT) IN
(SELECT DISTINCT K.GATE_CD ,K.BUYER_CD ,K.RFX_NUM ,K.RFX_CNT FROM STOCRQDT K WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) ) )) BID_COUNT
FROM ( SELECT -- 입찰 T.GATE_CD ,T.BUYER_CD ,T.BID_NUM ,T.BID_CNT ,T.APP_DOC_NUM ,T.APP_DOC_CNT ,NULL BID_DATE FROM STOCBDHD T WHERE (T.GATE_CD,T.BUYER_CD,T.BID_NUM,T.BID_CNT) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT K.GATE_CD ,K.BUYER_CD ,K.BID_NUM ,K.BID_CNT FROM STOCBDDT K WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) UNION ALL
SELECT -- 견적 T.GATE_CD ,T.BUYER_CD ,T.RFX_NUM BID_NUM ,T.RFX_CNT BID_CNT ,T.APP_DOC_NUM ,T.APP_DOC_CNT ,TO_CHAR(RFX_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BID_DATE FROM STOCRQHD T WHERE (T.GATE_CD,T.BUYER_CD,T.RFX_NUM,T.RFX_CNT) IN
(SELECT DISTINCT K.GATE_CD ,K.BUYER_CD ,K.RFX_NUM ,K.RFX_CNT FROM STOCRQDT K WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) AND ROWNUM = 1 )
) M WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) D ON 1 = 1
WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT A.GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,A.BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,A.CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,A.CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,A.PR_BUYER_CD --의뢰고객사 (계약체결 고객사) ,A.PR_DEPT_CD --의뢰부서/사무소 ,A.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,A.ITEM_SQ --고객사별 품목 항번 ,A.REG_DATE --등록일자 - [Registration Date] ,A.REG_USER_ID --등록자ID - (Registerer ID) ,A.MOD_DATE --수정일자 - (Update Date) ,A.MOD_USER_ID --수정자ID - (Updater ID) ,A.DEL_FLAG --삭제여부 - (Check whether it is deleted or not) ,(SELECT IRS_NO FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = D.GATE_CD AND VENDOR_CD = D.VENDOR_CD) IRS_NO --업체 사업자번호 ,A.CONT_WT_NUM --계약서 대기번호 - [Contract Waiting No] ,A.EXEC_NUM --품의번호 - (RFA No.) ,A.EXEC_SQ --품의항번 - (RFA Sequence No.) ,A.PURCHASE_TYPE --구매유형[M061] ,A.ITEM_CD --품목코드 - (Item Code) ,A.ITEM_DESC --품명 - (Item Name)WW ,A.ITEM_SPEC --, ,A.MAKER_CD --제조사코드 [STOCMKBR, MK] ,GETMKBRNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.BUYER_CD, 'MK', A.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM --제조사명 ,A.MAKER_PART_NO --제조사모델번호 ,A.ORIGIN_CD --원산지코드 [M004] ,A.ITEM_QT --수량 ,A.UNIT_CD --단위 ,A.ITEM_PRC --단가 ,A.ITEM_AMT --금액 ,A.SW_BIZ_AMT --[용역] SW사업대가 ,A.MNT_SANGJU_YN --[용역] 상주여부 ,A.CONSUMER_AMT --[물품/공사] 소비자금액 ,A.FC_MNT_TERM --[물품/공사] 무상유지보수기간 ,A.CH_RATE --[물품/공사] 유상요율 ,A.DOIB_AMOUNT --[유지보수] 도입금액 ,A.MNT_RATE --[유지보수] 유지보수요율 ,A.MNT_SDAY --[유지보수] 유지보수 시작일 ,A.MNT_EDAY --[유지보수] 유지보수 종료일 ,A.MNT_GUR_MONTH --[유지보수] 개월수 ,A.RT_INSP_PERIOD --[유지보수] 정기점검주기 ,A.FALT_RC_TG_TIME --[유지보수] 장애복구목표시간 ,A.DUE_DATE --납기요청일 ,A.IV_BUYER_CD --검수고객사 ,A.IV_DEPT_CD --검수부서/사무소 ,A.IV_USER_ID --검수자ID ,A.PR_NUM --구매의뢰번호 - (P/R No.) ,A.PR_SQ --구매의뢰항번 - (P/R Sequence No.) ,(A.N_CM_REQ_ID, B.CM_REQ_ID) AS CM_REQ_ID --계약의뢰ID ,(A.N_CM_REQ_DET_ID, B.CM_REQ_DET_ID) AS CM_REQ_DET_ID --세부계약의뢰번호 ,(A.N_MULPUM_ID, B.MULPUM_ID) AS MULPUM_ID --물품ID ,GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'M301', B.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE --계약방법 [M301] (일반경쟁/제한경쟁/지명경쟁/수의계약) ,NVL( ( SELECT GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'M302', B.CONT_TYPE2, #{ses.langCd}) FROM STOCBDDT K JOIN STOCBDHD B ON K.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND K.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND K.BID_NUM = B.BID_NUM AND K.BID_CNT = B.BID_CNT WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) ,GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'M302', B.SUBMIT_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) )SUBMIT_TYPE ,CASE WHEN B.PURCHASE_TYPE IN ('S','B') THEN NVL(ROUND((A.ITEM_AMT - A.SW_BIZ_AMT) / NULLIF(A.ITEM_AMT * 100, 0)), 0) -- 용역 WHEN B.PURCHASE_TYPE IN ('G','C','E','T') THEN NVL(ROUND((A.ITEM_AMT - A.CONSUMER_AMT) / NULLIF(A.ITEM_AMT * 100, 0)) ,0) --물품,공사,기타,양수 ELSE 0 END DISCOUNT_RATE --할인율 ,A."5_CONT_AMT" --중앙회계약금액(원) ,A."1_CONT_AMT" --은행계약금액(원) ,A."3_CONT_AMT" --기타계약금액(원) ,A."2_CONT_AMT" --지역농축협계약금액(원) ,A."A_CONT_AMT" --금융지주계약금액(원) ,A."B_CONT_AMT" --경제지주계약금액(원) ,A."D_CONT_AMT" --손해보험계약금액(원) ,A."C_CONT_AMT" --생명보험계약금액(원) ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."5_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."5_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."5_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "5_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."1_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."1_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."1_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "1_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."3_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."3_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."3_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "3_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."2_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."2_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."2_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "2_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."A_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."A_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."A_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "A_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."B_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."B_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."B_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "B_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."D_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."D_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."D_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "D_VAT_AMT" ,CASE WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '0' THEN 0 WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN A."C_CONT_AMT" - TRUNC(A."C_CONT_AMT" / 1.1) WHEN D.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(A."C_CONT_AMT" / 10) ELSE 0 END "C_VAT_AMT" ,( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = A.PR_BUYER_CD ) CORP_TYPE --계약체결고객사 법인구분 FROM STOCECMT A JOIN STOCPRDT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.PB_BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM AND A.PR_SQ = B.PR_SQ AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' JOIN STOCPRHD C ON B.GATE_CD = C.GATE_CD AND B.BUYER_CD = C.BUYER_CD AND B.PR_NUM = C.PR_NUM AND C.IF_TYPE = #{IF_TYPE} JOIN STOCECCT D ON A.GATE_CD = D.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = D.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = D.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = D.CONT_CNT WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT B.GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,B.BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,B.CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,B.CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,B.PR_BUYER_CD --의뢰고객사 (계약체결 고객사) ,B.PR_DEPT_CD --의뢰부서/사무소 ,B.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,B.PAY_CNT --지급차수 ,B.PY_BUYER_CD --지불고객사 ,B.PY_DEPT_CD --지불부서/사무소 ,B.REG_DATE --등록일자 - [Registration Date] ,B.REG_USER_ID --등록자ID - (Registerer ID) ,B.MOD_DATE --수정일자 - (Update Date) ,B.MOD_USER_ID --수정자ID - (Updater ID) ,B.DEL_FLAG --삭제여부 - (Check whether it is deleted or not) ,(SELECT IRS_NO FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND VENDOR_CD = B.VENDOR_CD) IRS_NO --업체 사업자번호 ,B.PAY_AMT --지급금액 - (Payment Amount) or 계약금액 ,B.GUAR_TYPE --보증구분[M404] ,B.GUAR_PERCENT --보증율 - Guarantee Percentage) ,B.GUAR_QT --하자이행보증기간_월 - (Warranty Guarantee Period_Month) ,B.VAT_FLAG --보증금VAT여부 ,B.GUAR_AMT --보증금 - (Guarantee Amount) ,B.ATT_FILE_NUM --보증첨부파일번호 ,B.GUAR_NUM --보증증권번호 ,B.INSU_STATUS --보증상태 ,B.RMK --비고 ,B.GUAR_TYPE2 --보증방법 [M401] ,B.GUARANTEER --보증기관 [M402] ,( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = B.PR_BUYER_CD ) CORP_TYPE --계약체결고객사 법인구분 ,( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = B.PY_BUYER_CD ) PY_CORP_TYPE --지불고객사 법인구분 FROM STOCECPC B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND B.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = B.PY_BUYER_CD )
= '5'
= '1'
IN ('1','5')

SELECT A.GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,A.BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,A.CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,A.CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,A.PR_BUYER_CD --의뢰고객사 (계약체결 고객사) ,A.PR_DEPT_CD --의뢰부서/사무소 ,A.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,A.PAY_CNT --지급차수 - (Payment Ordinal No.) ,A.REG_DATE --등록일자 - [Registration Date] ,A.REG_USER_ID --등록자ID - (Registerer ID) ,A.MOD_DATE --수정일자 - (Update Date) ,A.MOD_USER_ID --수정자ID - (Updater ID) ,A.DEL_FLAG --삭제여부 - (Check whether it is deleted or not) ,A.PAY_CNT_TYPE --지급차수구분 - [M097] ,A.PAY_CNT_NM --지급차수명 - (Payment Count Name) ,ROUND(SUM(B.PAY_AMT) / MAX(TOTAL_PAY_AMT) * 100) AS PAY_PERCENT --지급율 퍼센트(%) - (Payment Percentage) ,SUM(B.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT --지급금액 - (Payment Amount) ,A.PAY_METHOD_TYPE --세부지급조건 - (Payment Method) - [M018] ,A.PAY_METHOD_NM --지급상세내역 - (Payment Term Name) ,A.PAY_DUE_DATE --지급예정일자 - (Payment Due Date) ,(SELECT IRS_NO FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD=A.GATE_CD AND VENDOR_CD=A.VENDOR_CD) IRS_NO --업체 사업자번호 ,( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = A.PR_BUYER_CD ) CORP_TYPE --계약체결고객사 법인구분 FROM STOCECPC B JOIN STOCECPY A ON B.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND B.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND B.CONT_NUM = A.CONT_NUM AND B.CONT_CNT = A.CONT_CNT AND B.PR_BUYER_CD = A.PR_BUYER_CD AND B.PR_DEPT_CD = A.PR_DEPT_CD AND B.VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD AND B.PAY_CNT = A.PAY_CNT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(B.PAY_AMT) TOTAL_PAY_AMT FROM STOCECPC B -- LEFT OUTER JOIN JOIN STOCECPY A ON B.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND B.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND B.CONT_NUM = A.CONT_NUM AND B.CONT_CNT = A.CONT_CNT AND B.PR_BUYER_CD = A.PR_BUYER_CD AND B.PR_DEPT_CD = A.PR_DEPT_CD AND B.VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD AND B.PAY_CNT = A.PAY_CNT WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND B.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = B.PY_BUYER_CD )
= '5'
= '1'
IN ('1','5')
) C ON 1 = 1 WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND B.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND B.PAY_CNT NOT IN (0,-1) -- 계약보증 차액보증 제외 AND ( SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = B.PY_BUYER_CD )
= '5'
= '1'
IN ('1','5')
GROUP BY A.GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,A.BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,A.CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,A.CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,A.PR_BUYER_CD --의뢰고객사 (계약체결 고객사) ,A.PR_DEPT_CD --의뢰부서/사무소 ,A.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,A.PAY_CNT --지급차수 - (Payment Ordinal No.) ,A.REG_DATE --등록일자 - [Registration Date] ,A.REG_USER_ID --등록자ID - (Registerer ID) ,A.MOD_DATE --수정일자 - (Update Date) ,A.MOD_USER_ID --수정자ID - (Updater ID) ,A.DEL_FLAG --삭제여부 - (Check whether it is deleted or not) ,A.PAY_CNT_TYPE --지급차수구분 - [M097] ,A.PAY_CNT_NM --지급차수명 - (Payment Count Name) ,A.PAY_PERCENT --지급율 퍼센트(%) - (Payment Percentage) ,A.PAY_METHOD_TYPE --세부지급조건 - (Payment Method) - [M018] ,A.PAY_METHOD_NM --지급상세내역 - (Payment Term Name) ,A.PAY_DUE_DATE --지급예정일자 - (Payment Due Date)

SELECT A.GATE_CD ,A.BUYER_CD ,A.CONT_NUM ,A.CONT_CNT ,A.VENDOR_CD ,A.SELECT_FLAG ,A.VENDOR_NM ,A.IRS_NO ,substrb(A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM,0,20) VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,MAX(A.REG_DATE ) REG_DATE ,MAX(A.REG_USER_ID ) REG_USER_ID FROM ( -- 입찰 SELECT DISTINCT #{ses.gateCd} GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,#{BUYER_CD} BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,#{CONT_NUM} CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,#{CONT_CNT} CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,N.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,N.REG_DATE --생성일자 - [Registration Date] ,N.REG_USER_ID --생성자ID - (Registerer ID) ,CASE WHEN #{VENDOR_CD} = N.VENDOR_CD THEN '1' ELSE '0' END SELECT_FLAG --선정여부 ,V.VENDOR_NM --업체명 ,V.IRS_NO --업체 사업자번호 ,U.USER_NM VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM --업체담당자명 - [Vendor PIC User Name] ,U.EMAIL VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL --업체담당자 이메일주소 ,U.CELL_NUM VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM --업체담당자 휴대전화번호 FROM STOCBDVD N JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT K.GATE_CD ,K.BUYER_CD ,K.BID_NUM ,K.BID_CNT FROM STOCBDDT K WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) ) M ON N.GATE_CD = M.GATE_CD AND N.BUYER_CD = M.BUYER_CD AND N.BID_NUM = M.BID_NUM AND N.BID_CNT = M.BID_CNT JOIN STOCVNGL V ON N.GATE_CD = V.GATE_CD AND N.VENDOR_CD = V.VENDOR_CD JOIN STOCCVUR U ON N.GATE_CD = U.GATE_CD AND N.REG_USER_ID = U.USER_ID UNION ALL -- 견적 SELECT DISTINCT #{ses.gateCd} GATE_CD --게이트코드 - [Gate Code] ,#{BUYER_CD} BUYER_CD --고객사코드 ,#{CONT_NUM} CONT_NUM --계약서번호 - (Contract No.) ,#{CONT_CNT} CONT_CNT --계약차수 - (Contract Ordinal No.) ,N.VENDOR_CD --업체코드 - [Vendor Code] ,N.REG_DATE --생성일자 - [Registration Date] ,N.REG_USER_ID --생성자ID - (Registerer ID) ,CASE WHEN #{VENDOR_CD} = N.VENDOR_CD THEN '1' ELSE '0' END SELECT_FLAG --선정여부 ,V.VENDOR_NM --업체명 ,V.IRS_NO --업체 사업자번호 ,U.USER_NM VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM --업체담당자명 - [Vendor PIC User Name] ,U.EMAIL VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL --업체담당자 이메일주소 ,U.CELL_NUM VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM --업체담당자 휴대전화번호 FROM STOCRQVN N JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT K.GATE_CD ,K.BUYER_CD ,K.RFX_NUM ,K.RFX_CNT FROM STOCRQDT K WHERE (K.PB_BUYER_CD,K.PR_NUM,K.PR_SQ) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT B.PB_BUYER_CD ,B.PR_NUM ,B.PR_SQ FROM STOCECCT A JOIN STOCECMT B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND A.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND A.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND (SELECT IF_TYPE FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = B.PB_BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = B.PR_NUM ) = #{IF_TYPE} -- IF_TYPE 유형에 따라 처리 ) ) M ON N.GATE_CD = M.GATE_CD AND N.BUYER_CD = M.BUYER_CD AND N.RFX_NUM = M.RFX_NUM AND N.RFX_CNT = M.RFX_CNT JOIN STOCVNGL V ON N.GATE_CD = V.GATE_CD AND N.VENDOR_CD = V.VENDOR_CD JOIN STOCCVUR U ON N.GATE_CD = U.GATE_CD AND N.REG_USER_ID = U.USER_ID ) A GROUP BY A.GATE_CD ,A.BUYER_CD ,A.CONT_NUM ,A.CONT_CNT ,A.VENDOR_CD ,A.SELECT_FLAG ,A.VENDOR_NM ,A.IRS_NO ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM
SELECT LPAD(SEQ_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL,3,'0') SEQ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') TODAY , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HHMMSS') TOTIME FROM DUAL
